title: narcissus × johnstonii
intro: Narcissus × johnstonii is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the garden narcissus (Narcissus pseudonarcissus) and the poeticus narcissus (Narcissus poeticus), resulting in a hardy and fragrant perennial. The medicinal properties of Narcissus × johnstonii include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming or using the plant in herbal preparations include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × johnstonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
